data.body: Classification: llm-behavioral. File plugins/dso/skills/design-review/docs/review-criteria.md is in skills/ dir — routes through LLM-behavioral path. Root cause: Validation section says 'Do not run validation a second time from this skill' without providing a fallback for when caller_id is missing. If a caller omits caller_id, the protocol-level validation in REVIEW-PROTOCOL-WORKFLOW.md never fires, and the skill has no warning path — gap is silently swallowed. Fix: add an explicit skill-level fallback warning block to the Validation section.
